title: gymnogramma affinis
intro: Gymnogramma affinis, also known as the Fern Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, which is a type of thistle. It is native to South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant is said to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Gymnogramma affinis is traditionally prepared in herbal tea or powder form, with reported health benefits including the treatment of fever, sore throats, and other minor ailments.
